Short CV

Instructor Maide Gökçe BEKAROĞLU, Ph.D. completed her undergraduate education in İstanbul Technical University, Department of Physics Engineering in 2012. Then, she completed her master's degree in the Department of Physics Engineering at İstanbul Technical University in 2015, and she completed her doctorate in the Department of Physics Engineering at İstanbul Technical University in 2023.
